title: lobelia alata var. minor
intro: Lobelia alata var. minor, also known as Lobelia minor or Glutinosum, is a plant species belonging to the Lobeliaceae family, typically found in wetlands and marshy areas. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, making it effective in relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Lobelia alata var. minor include its ability to ease coughs, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat respiratory and cardiovascular conditions.
